cards.title: The Beatles
cards.flavorText: Four names, one signal. The whole century still hums the chorus.

cards.title: Black hole
cards.flavorText: The card does not consume the page. It bends the room around it.

cards.title: World War II
cards.flavorText: Its scale is so vast the whole collection feels smaller around it.

cards.title: Solar System
cards.flavorText: Not a card, a map of every path light takes to come back home.

cards.title: Ada Lovelace
cards.flavorText: She saw an engine of numbers and imagined a machine of ideas.

cards.title: Marie Curie
cards.flavorText: Few names glow brighter where science and resolve meet.

cards.title: Internet
cards.flavorText: Invisible roads, impossible scale, and the whole planet on the wire.
